title: Bolsius Reed Diffuser - Mimosa - 60 ml - 1 piece - Fragrance lasts up to 6 weeks - Natural home fragrance with natural extracts
features: Enjoy a long-lasting olfactory experience with the True Scents Mimosa scented bouquet; the streamlined bottle design allows for flawless positioning of the three sticks
Mimosa is a delicately powdery fragrance reminiscent of iris and flowering violets; enjoy this floral fragrance and transform your home into a comfortable home

True Scents integrates iconic fragrances and natural extracts with an optimized vegan formula; the streamlined bottle design allows for impeccable positioning of the three sticks forming the fragrance bouquet, for a gradual diffusion of subtle fragrance into the room
Choose your favorite fragrance from Bolsius' True Scents collection; true Scents combines iconic fragrances with natural extracts; made with love for people and the planet
Since 1870, Bolsius has been making quality products that create comfort and ambiance; we do it with passion, artisan way and with love for people and the planet

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Place the product in a place where the fragrance can spread optimally, but not next to or over heat sources. Place them on a solid surface to prevent the product from falling off and keep it away from children. There is no need to twist the sticks. Did you know that your nose can get used to a smell and after a while you don't feel it? So change the scents of your home regularly to be sure you continue to enjoy them.
